title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
